zh.lifeSummary: 當Muriel Langetot於大約1155年出生在英國波克夏時，她的父親Geoffrey FitzWilliam37歲，母親Emma Langetot44歲。她於大約1224年與Robert Danvers of Winterbourne在英國波克夏結婚。她去世於1224年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Muriel Langetot于大约1155年出生在英国波克夏时，她的父亲Geoffrey FitzWilliam37岁，母亲Emma Langetot44岁。她于大约1224年与Robert Danvers of Winterbourne在英国波克夏结婚。她去世于1224年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Muriel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin ( see Muireall ). Forms of the name are found in Breton as well as in Irish and Scottish Gaelic, and in the form Meriel it was in use in the heart of England in the Middle Ages. The surname Merrill is derived from it. As Muriel it was at first used mainly in Scotland, but became more widely popular during the first half of the 20th century. Since then it has fallen from favour again.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Muriel Langetot was born about 1155, in Berkshire, England, her father, Geoffrey FitzWilliam, was 37 and her mother, Emma Langetot, was 44. She married Robert Danvers of Winterbourne about 1224, in Berkshire, England. She died after 1224.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muriel Langetot est née environ 1155, à Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey FitzWilliam, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Emma Langetot, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Danvers of Winterbourne environ 1224, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée après 1224.

de.lifeSummary: Als Muriel Langetot um 1155 in Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey FitzWilliam 37 und ihre Mutter Emma Langetot 44. Sie hat um 1224 in Berkshire, England Robert Danvers of Winterbourne geheiratet. Sie starb nach 1224.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel Langetot è nata il circa 1155 nel Berkshire, England, sua padre, Geoffrey FitzWilliam, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Emma Langetot, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Robert Danvers of Winterbourne circa 1224, nel Berkshire, England. Morì dopo il 1224.

ja.lifeSummary: Muriel Langetotが約1155年にイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey FitzWilliamは37歳，母Emma Langetotは44歳であった。約1224年にイギリスバークシュアイアでRobert Danvers of Winterbourneと結婚した。彼女は1224年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Muriel Langetot(이)가 대략 1155년 영국 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey FitzWilliam(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Langetot(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1224년 영국 버크실르에서 Robert Danvers of Winterbourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1224년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel Langetot nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey FitzWilliam, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Emma Langetot, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Danvers of Winterbourne aproximadamente 1224, em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu após 1224.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muriel Langetot родилась около 1155 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey FitzWilliam было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Langetot, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Danvers of Winterbourne около 1224 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. Она умерла после 1224 г.
